source_pr.title: domain: Fix data race
source_pr.body: Using MockReloadFailed  leads to data race. Now fix it.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky under the race detector because a mock flag (MockReloadFailed) was accessed concurrently without synchronization. This PR stabilizes it by wrapping the mock flag with a RWMutex-protected helper and accessing it via SetValue/getValue.
fix_pattern: Guard mock flags/shared state used across goroutines with synchronization (RWMutex/atomic) to avoid data races.
